name: current-affairs-quiz-app
description: Current Affairs Quiz App - Node.js + React + MongoDB

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.prebuild: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.build: npm run prebuild && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build:full: npm install && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
